headline.text: L1 S3 ended shift with *almonds* in pecan rework area — team coached on area segregation and cleaning.

summary: One active hold resolved: L1 S2 pouches with illegible Best By dates reworked after printer adjustment. Allergen cross-contact near-miss on S3. Two tool-control gaps (missing wrench L2, lost ruler L3). S4 packaging quality affecting L3 downstream.

holds.title: S2 pouches — illegible Best By dates
holds.summary: MM7 printer produced illegible lot codes; 2+ pallets held, then reworked after Caleb York adjusted print window and label height.
holds.status: Resolved on shift — printer adjusted, all held pallets reworked and released back to line by 22:23.

quality.title: S4 torn wrap causing L3 scrap
quality.summary: L3 reports torn wrap and exposed caramel pieces from S4 jamming Multiformat Matrix; 16 lbs scrap in 4 hours despite 2-person inspection.
quality.status: Open — L3 requested S4 solve torn-wrap root cause; Curt Willis acknowledged.

quality.title: Truffle Cavanna 2 belt fraying
quality.summary: One belt on Cavanna 2 starting to fray; maintenance notified to assess replacement before further deterioration.
quality.status: Resolved on shift — maintenance notified and addressing.

quality.title: MF Matrix — unwrapped candies sticking
quality.summary: Significant appearance deviations observed during monitoring: unwrapped candies adhering to one another.
quality.status: Open — QA recommended reinforce continuous monitoring to ensure optimal final-product quality.

sanitation.title: S2 sucotherm drain needs attention
sanitation.summary: Jorel Gourdin flagged area and drain under S2 sucotherm for immediate cleaning attention.
sanitation.status: Open — flagged to Katya Farnsworth and Justin Garner for follow-up.

allergen.title: S3 almonds in pecan rework area
allergen.summary: Katya Farnsworth found cart with almonds sitting in the pecan rework area at end of 1st shift; risk of cross-contact if ingredients co-mingle.
allergen.status: Open — Katya coaching Luis Falcon's team to ensure allergen areas left clean and segregated at shift end.

opportunities.text: Consider adding label print legibility to S2 hourly quality checks — based on today's MM7 illegible Best By event that required hold and rework.
Review end-of-shift allergen area inspection and handoff protocol for S3 — based on almonds left in pecan rework zone.
Review S4 flow-wrap setup and quality checks — today's torn wrap generated 16 lbs scrap at L3 downstream despite double inspection.
Consider shift-start/end tool shadow-board photo protocol for ML2 — 10-size wrench missing entire shift with no resolution.
Review tool control procedures for MF Matrix — ruler lost mid-shift, no immediate recovery or FM investigation noted.
